text.title: error-handling Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from URI namespace to live contract gate.

step.name: declare-type-uris
step.input: List of error classes the API will return (validation, auth, not-found, rate-limit, internal).
step.action: Define a stable URI namespace `https://api.example.com/errors/<slug>` and document each (`type`, `title`, `status`) in OpenAPI.
step.decision-gate: If team cannot commit to URI stability, stop — methodology requires this guarantee (rule:r7).

step.name: model-problem-detail
step.action: Define a ProblemDetail data class (Pydantic BaseModel / TypeScript interface / Java record) with type, title, status, detail, instance, traceId, errors[].
step.output: One model file in shared module.
step.decision-gate: Model must serialize unknown extension fields permissively (additionalProperties: true at JSON Schema level).

step.name: register-one-handler
step.action: Register a single framework-level exception handler that catches all unhandled exceptions and returns ProblemDetail with `Content-Type: application/problem+json`.
step.output: One handler file; per-route handlers removed.
step.decision-gate: Grep CI rule blocks per-route `JSONResponse(content={"error":` patterns after this step.

step.name: propagate-traceid
step.action: Read W3C `traceparent`; if absent generate UUID. Set on response body and log line.
step.output: Updated handler + middleware that ensures trace context exists per request.
step.decision-gate: If trace propagation is missing for cross-service calls, also add the traceparent header outbound.

step.name: contract-test
step.input: JSON Schema from templates/problem-details.schema.yaml + every error endpoint.
step.action: Author an integration test that hits each error path and validates response body+content-type against the schema.
step.decision-gate: If any endpoint fails the schema, block deploy; fix shape before merging.
